reason: Tested agent chat functionality: navigated to localhost:47891, selected agent QA-20260710-184542-48xf, verified status was "idle", sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?", and verified response contains "4".
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully, sidebar visible with two agents listed.
Found and clicked "QA-20260710-184542-48xf" agent in sidebar — Successfully navigated to agent page showing "idle" status.
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status confirmed as "idle" in the status indicator.
Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message successfully typed in input box and sent via Send button.
Waited for response — Response received immediately. Agent responded with "4" after working for 1 second.
Verified response mentions "4" — Response clearly visible in chat view showing "4" as the agent's answer, and confirmed in screenshot final_response.png.
